mapper.insert: insert into osh_user_invitation (inviter_id, invitee_id, invite_code, create_time) values (#{inviterId}, #{inviteeId}, #{inviteCode}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select i.invitee_id as inviteeId, u.username as username, u.avatar as avatar, i.create_time as createTime from osh_user_invitation i left join osh_user u on u.id = i.invitee_id where i.inviter_id = #{inviterId} order by i.create_time desc
